messages.content: hey, kind of a brutal week honestly. just wanna decompress for a sec
That sounds like a week worth setting down for a minute. What's been the heaviest part of it?
work's been slammed, three deadlines stacked on top of each other and my manager keeps adding stuff
That kind of piling-on wears you down in a particular way — it's not just the work, it's the feeling that the pile has no floor. What's it been like trying to keep up with it all?
i'm just wiped. like physically tired, gonna crash early tonight and hopefully feel human tomorrow
Rest sounds exactly right. Sometimes the most useful thing a hard week can teach you is where your limit is.
ngl part of me wishes i could just disappear for a weekend with no phone lol. a cabin or something

That image makes a lot of sense after a week like that — real quiet, no notifications, just some space to remember what your own thoughts sound like. Is that kind of reset something you've actually been able to do for yourself before?
anyway thanks for letting me vent. nothing's wrong really, just needed to dump it somewhere
Glad it helped to put it somewhere. Go get that sleep — sounds like you've earned it.
